messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Build a dashboard module with auth and an API, with unit tests and database stubs. Include modules A and B.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Build a dashboard module with auth and an API, with unit tests and database stubs. Include modules A and B.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "design-dashboard-module",
      "title": "Design dashboard architecture and modules A/B",
      "description": "Define architecture, data flows, interfaces, and component boundaries for the dashboard module including Module A and Module B.",
      "status": "completed",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Architectural diagrams, API contracts, data models, and an integration plan for Module A and Module B are documented and reviewed."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-module-a",
      "title": "Implement Module A core functionality",
      "description": "Develop Module A according to the design: implement core business logic, interface endpoints, and internal tests for the module.",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "dependencies": [
        "design-dashboard-module"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "Module A compiles and runs, exposes defined interfaces, passes its internal unit tests, and matches the design contract."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-module-b",
      "title": "Implement Module B core functionality",
      "description": "Develop Module B as specified: implement its business logic, public interfaces, and accompanying internal tests.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "design-dashboard-module"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Module B is implemented, exposes required interfaces, and passes its internal unit tests validating expected behavior."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-auth-service",
      "title": "Implement authentication and authorization service",
      "description": "Create an auth service (token-based) that issues and validates credentials and integrates with Module A and Module B.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "design-dashboard-module",
        "implement-module-a",
        "implement-module-b"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "Auth service issues/validates tokens, enforces authorization rules for Module A/B, and is covered by unit tests demonstrating access control."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-database-stubs",
      "title": "Create database stubs and test doubles",
      "description": "Implement database stubs and mock adapters to simulate persistent storage for local development and unit tests.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "design-dashboard-module"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Reusable DB stubs simulate CRUD operations, are configurable for test scenarios, and are integrated into the test harness."
    },
    {
      "id": "build-api-endpoints",
      "title": "Build API endpoints for dashboard functionality",
      "description": "Implement REST/GraphQL API endpoints exposing dashboard features, wiring endpoints to Module A/B and the auth service.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-module-a",
        "implement-module-b",
        "implement-auth-service"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "API endpoints follow the documented contracts, enforce auth, return expected payloads, and are manually tested for core scenarios."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-unit-tests",
      "title": "Write unit tests covering modules, API, and auth",
      "description": "Author unit tests that exercise Module A, Module B, the auth service, and API endpoints using the database stubs.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-module-a",
        "implement-module-b",
        "implement-auth-service",
        "build-api-endpoints",
        "create-database-stubs"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Automated test suite runs with >80% coverage for the new code paths, all tests pass in CI using the DB stubs, and regression tests validate auth and API behavior."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down decomposition: start with an overall design of the dashboard and its two modules (A and B), then implement each module separately. Build the auth service after module interfaces are known so it can integrate cleanly. Implement API endpoints to expose functionality once modules and auth are implemented. Create lightweight database stubs early for development and use them to drive unit tests that validate modules, API, and auth end-to-end."
}
